post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 233: Starcraft Mafia: Electric Boogaloo

Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.9: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.10: Confirm your participation in the game by posting in the thread, in bold, your favorite unit from competitive multiplayer Starcraft (from any game)
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and Vote: fDAs is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, Vote:fdas, Vote: fads, Vote: fdsa, and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially hanged and will take 200 damage. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 336 hours (2 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • 3.4: The night deadline will be 120 hours after night begins.
    • 3.5: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.6: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.7: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.11: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.12: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I (fdas) am the moderator of Mafia Game 233
    • 5.2: Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • 5.3: Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • 5.4: Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • 5.5: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.6: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Mechanics
Overview
Every player will be a unit from some Starcraft source but will not be from multiplayer competitive Starcraft. All units are considered to be ground units for this game. You can message me at any time if you have questions about anything. Each night a player can attack and deal damage to another player who may be able to attack you back if his range is greater than or equal to yours. Certain units may also have abilities which cost energy that they can use.


Taking damage
Every day, the person who receives a majority of the votes will receive 200 damage (ignores armor or external abilities). When a person’s total health reaches 0, the person will be dead and out of the game.
During the night, players can choose to attack another player. They will attack that person once. If the other player has equal range to your or greater range then you then they can attack back.
In addition to attacking, a player may also use an ability. Both attacking and targeting a player with an ability is considered "visiting" for mechanical purposes.


Damage = (attack-armor). Damage will be rounded up. All attacks do a minimum of 1 damage.
Shields have no armor.



Health/Energy Regeneration

If you are a zerg unit then at the end of each night you will regain 10 health, unless otherwise stated. Your current health cannot exceed your maximum health. If you are a protoss unit then at the end of each night you will regain 20 shields, unless otherwise stated.
Units regain 20 energy at the end of each night, unless otherwise stated or if energy is reduced by the affect of another ability.
People will not be able to see exactly how much health/shields they currently have, but they can see the color of their health bar. Green is between 6/7 and 7/7, yellow is between 4/7 and 6/7, orange is between 2/7 and 4/7, red is between 0 and 2/7.
People can see how much energy they currently have.



All players can be provided fake role pms upon request, and they may specify what kind of role they want a claim for.

Story
A group of Terran colonists, seeking to escape the war and turmoil in the Koprulu Sector, searched far and wide for somewhere to make a new home. Eventually, they came across the perfect place. The planet of AoPS-233 (the 233rd planet in the AoPS system). Two other planets in the system had been colonized before (though they suffered unfortunate fates), but this time the colonists hoped to do better. They established a thriving colony and things were looking up. Unfortunately, their hopes for a peaceful life were dashed when void rifts began opening up on the planet, depositing people and creatures from beyond the bounds of time and space.


There is a pre game consultation period where people can ask questions about their roles and the mechanics of the game. People may talk in their quicktopics during this time. Day 1 begins at 18:00:00 EDT 25 May 2021.

post_rendered:
In general, when a player has died or otherwise been finally removed from the game, they may not post in the game thread until the game is over.

However, some players like to make a brief comment along the lines of saying "bah!" shortly after it is revealed that they are dead. A pro-Town player may say "Go Town!" while a member of the Mafia who has been eliminated may say "Go Scum!". This is called a "Bah!" post.

If you are thinking of doing this, please bear in mind the following very important points:

A "Bah!" post cannot contain any game-related information. It is completely unacceptable, for example, for an officially-dead Cop to post the results of any investigations after they are dead, or for a dead player to propose that someone should be eliminated next.
Some Moderators do not allow "Bah!" posts under any circumstances. Check the Moderator's rules first. If you're not sure, PM the Mod before doing anything.

Sectional thoughts
-> thru #100 (Game Begins) sypnosis: RA leantown. yaj is more competent than I remember. s1 is pushing for discussion etc but nai. ND has a single towny post (#36). ben#27 is odd.
-> thru #259 (andy claim) sypnosis: RA townread continues. bb and s1 are tentatively but fakeably town, bb being more likely town. Don't like o8. jk is borderline tmi but seems maybe just... town? jk has slipped up majorly as mafia before, though. Is t9 usually this headache inducing. Mindmeld ND. vx reads as not caught up with game fsr. lk seems more competent than usual. Given what I know of andy, I don't think his claim (#106) is at all rvs, though... are we dismissing it. ._.
-> thru #391 (Bob 'protoss claim') sypnosis: violet claimed protoss and no one noticed (#290/2)? Vain is slightly questionable--I can see ben/bb point but I just though he was not seeing the big picture. s1's jk take is... bad? mj was also slightly questionable (#305). lk seems town but also is asking questions without trying for answers -- reads as solvey but isn't interacting with anyone (#306/9). RA was comic relief before became annoying. jk actually seemed townish... or nonscumheaded. bb#382/4 bothered me, though, since seems ate-y.
-> thru #507 (jk claims...) sypnosis: I trust jk claim/town. I disagree with all of ND#415 strongest trs, especially andy and os bc what did os do ._. mj seems normal. Bob is questionable still (continued from previous section). #501-5. Oh wait idk if it's this section or previous but sz#508 reminded me that he has been doing absolutely nothing which is bad (has been posting).
-> thru #679 (ben returns) sypnosis: scb, thorn, and scipio are all [showing up and] doing nothing... which is bad. yaj#539 is also very bad. Vain remains slightly questionable. mj tentatively seems towny.
-> thru #925 (violet claims...) sypnosis: Osmium finally seems somewhat towny. kevin is honestly at nai since contribution is superficial. VK, RA are incomprehensible. I think I trust vx's claim? Pending since that seems to be an ongoing thing. sz and s1 continue to do nothing and get zero pushback. sb as well. And mathjay seems towny. bn is weird.
-> thru #1204 (ben & vain stuff) sypnosis: scb's strong pushback against ben pl was odd esp given low activity otherwise... However, ben on violet do or die is...? yaj continues to be v scummy. vain continues to be slightly questionable but honestly I haven't noticed the things for which he is being attacked (maybe bc not paying attention).
-> thru #1410 (Return to Osmium) sypnosis: os backtrack personally didn't bother me before ppl brought up backtracking... idk. sz, s1, sb all lurking and doing a grand total of nothing except maybe sb is better. ND is ? At the very beginning I agreed with him but he has been steadily declining which is problematic... yaj and o8 and t9 continue to be questionable. Notice how kevin *only* shows up to talk about mechanics or smthing v superficial.
-> thru now-ish 1700s (Modern Era) sypnosis: :thonk: mj is leading things. On one hand I agree with scipio, on the other hand scipio has done zero else and looks like hopping on first viable lhf. bb has disappeared. I'm not getting much fv scum although his defenses are thonk? ad is bad.

Current thoughts
Town (5): julian(?) vx/an/cl/lk(?)
Townread (2): RA(?), mathjay
Townlean (3): Bob, Osmium, scb
Scumlean/Null (6): VK, sz, s1, t9, vain, ND
Scumread (4): kevin, yaj (#1057/266/316), ad (for terrible readlist. I couldn't parse bn well fsr.), o8

[color=#f00]Night 1 begins. Current time: 18:00:00 EDT 8 June 2021.[/color]

post_rendered:
The lack of action during the day was not reflected when night fell. The seemingly peaceful colony sprung into action as battles erupted all over the planet. The sounds of gunfire and explosions, as well the skittering of alien creatures filled the air. The first to fall were a pair of mercenary comrades. violetmx12 died. He as a War Pig (Terran). andy09 died. He was a War Pig (Terran). Nearby, the corpse of an alien creature was found. kevinmathz died. He was a Hunter Killer (Zerg Swarm). When the colonists came across this gruesome scene, they were horrified by the carnage but also glad that the fearsome zerg creature was dead. However, they also found another dead terran nearby. mathjay died. He was Egon Stetmann (Terran). Lastly, another unusual alien was found, one of the enigmatic protoss. His shield had failed him and his body was fatally wounded by an attack. HannahW died. He was Aldaris (Protoss).

Day 2 begins. Current time: 20:00:00 EDT 13 June 2021.

. . . I should be caught up and stay caught up now. Sectional thoughts is for self reference and more detail ig :notlikeblob:, but reads tab has up to date thoughts.
Abbreviations
t9 = Thorn
o8 = ostriches
bn = ben
kz = kevin
s1 = scipio
VK = VKU
yj = yaj
an = andy
RA = RadioActive/mok
sz = snoozing
lk = lkar
bb = Bob
vx = violet
os = Osmium_
sb = socoobo
fv = Vain
jk = julian
cl = Chompinglightning

Sectional thoughts
-> thru #100 (Game Begins) sypnosis: RA leantown. yaj is more competent than I remember. s1 is pushing for discussion etc but nai. ND has a single towny post (#36). ben#27 is odd.
-> thru #259 (andy claim) sypnosis: RA townread continues. bb and s1 are tentatively but fakeably town, bb being more likely town. Don't like o8. jk is borderline tmi but seems maybe just... town? jk has slipped up majorly as mafia before, though. Is t9 usually this headache inducing. Mindmeld ND. vx reads as not caught up with game fsr. lk seems more competent than usual. Given what I know of andy, I don't think his claim (#106) is at all rvs, though... are we dismissing it. ._.
-> thru #391 (Bob 'protoss claim') sypnosis: violet claimed protoss and no one noticed (#290/2)? Vain is slightly questionable--I can see ben/bb point but I just though he was not seeing the big picture. s1's jk take is... bad? mj was also slightly questionable (#305). lk seems town but also is asking questions without trying for answers -- reads as solvey but isn't interacting with anyone (#306/9). RA was comic relief before became annoying. jk actually seemed townish... or nonscumheaded. bb#382/4 bothered me, though, since seems ate-y.
-> thru #507 (jk claims...) sypnosis: I trust jk claim/town. I disagree with all of ND#415 strongest trs, especially andy and os bc what did os do ._. mj seems normal. Bob is questionable still (continued from previous section). #501-5. Oh wait idk if it's this section or previous but sz#508 reminded me that he has been doing absolutely nothing which is bad (has been posting).
-> thru #679 (ben returns) sypnosis: scb, thorn, and scipio are all [showing up and] doing nothing... which is bad. yaj#539 is also very bad. Vain remains slightly questionable. mj tentatively seems towny.
-> thru #925 (violet claims...) sypnosis: Osmium finally seems somewhat towny. kevin is honestly at nai since contribution is superficial. VK, RA are incomprehensible. I think I trust vx's claim? Pending since that seems to be an ongoing thing. sz and s1 continue to do nothing and get zero pushback. sb as well. And mathjay seems towny. bn is weird.
-> thru #1204 (ben & vain stuff) sypnosis: scb's strong pushback against ben pl was odd esp given low activity otherwise... However, ben on violet do or die is...? yaj continues to be v scummy. vain continues to be slightly questionable but honestly I haven't noticed the things for which he is being attacked (maybe bc not paying attention).
-> thru #1410 (Return to Osmium) sypnosis: os backtrack personally didn't bother me before ppl brought up backtracking... idk. sz, s1, sb all lurking and doing a grand total of nothing except maybe sb is better. ND is ? At the very beginning I agreed with him but he has been steadily declining which is problematic... yaj and o8 and t9 continue to be questionable. Notice how kevin *only* shows up to talk about mechanics or smthing v superficial.
-> thru now-ish 1700s (Modern Era) sypnosis: :thonk: mj is leading things. On one hand I agree with scipio, on the other hand scipio has done zero else and looks like hopping on first viable lhf. bb has disappeared. I'm not getting much fv scum although his defenses are thonk? ad is bad.

Current thoughts
Town (5): julian(?) vx/an/cl/lk(?)
Townread (2): RA(?), mathjay
Townlean (3): Bob, Osmium, scb
Scumlean/Null (6): VK, sz, s1, t9, vain, ND
Scumread (4): kevin, yaj (#1057/266/316), ad (for terrible readlist. I couldn't parse bn well fsr.), o8

Spare things

post_rendered:
NDMath wrote:
I'm unaware, what's special about those four characters?
Tychus Findlay, Sarah Kerrigan, and Artanis are the three characters displayed on the "cover" of Starcraft II. Jim Raynor, Sarah Kerrigan, and Artanis are the three protagonists of WoL, HotS, and LotV, respectively. The two zerglings (Meat Eater and Devours Children) are from the campaign of Starcraft I after the Brood War expansion. The hunter killers were created by Sarah Kerrigan and in Starcraft II WoL they function as the guards of Kerrigan in the last mission and in co-op. All of these lorewise point toward Sarah Kerrigan existing in the game.

Also, as a side note, the death of Aldaris does lorewise point toward Protoss being Terran-aligned.

And yes, I did play through the entire campaign of Starcraft II. Don't remember as much of Starcraft I though since I played that when I was like 8.
post_canonical:
[quote=NDMath]I'm unaware, what's special about those four characters?[/quote]
Tychus Findlay, Sarah Kerrigan, and Artanis are the three characters displayed on the "cover" of Starcraft II. Jim Raynor, Sarah Kerrigan, and Artanis are the three protagonists of WoL, HotS, and LotV, respectively. The two zerglings (Meat Eater and Devours Children) are from the campaign of Starcraft I after the Brood War expansion. The hunter killers were created by Sarah Kerrigan and in Starcraft II WoL they function as the guards of Kerrigan in the last mission and in co-op. All of these lorewise point toward Sarah Kerrigan existing in the game.

Also, as a side note, the death of Aldaris does lorewise point toward Protoss being Terran-aligned.

And yes, I did play through the entire campaign of Starcraft II. Don't remember as much of Starcraft I though since I played that when I was like 8.

post_rendered:
The surviving colonists were unable to sleep during the night as the noises of battle outside were quite large. They could hear the roars of a large creature and the screeching of metal bending and collapsing from the damage caused by the fight. Unable to sit still any longer, they went outside to observe what was going on. During the night, everyone's true forms were revealed. They saw a massive zerg creature, resembling an ultralisk except even larger and more monstrous. It was fighting another zerg creature, one much smaller than itself. Its opponent, while clearly zerg, appeared quite human like, being a mixture of woman and zerg. Despite her much smaller size, she didn't seem concerned at all when fighting the much larger creature. The large beast thrashed around, failing to land a blow on its much nimbler opponent. Finally, the large creature collapsed, brought down by purple psionic lightning. yaj.jhajhria died. He was Devours Adults

Now, the queen of the zerg turned to the remaining colonists. She picked out one man from the crowd. "It was very nice of you to keep everyone focused on this wild animal, Jimmy. I had an easy time getting rid of the other annoying pests. Those meddlesome protoss won't be able to make a last minute sacrifice this time. Now, this planet is mine. And we can enjoy our time together, just you and me."

"Why'd you do this, Sarah?" Raynor asked.

"Because I could," she replied. "And you know those others wouldn't be able to tolerate me. It was either them or myself."


And so it was, the tale of the failed colony on the planet of AoPS-233 came to a close.
